copy.name: 瓷韵-青花瓷
copy.title: Ceramic packaging
copy.subtitle: 青花瓷 / 纹样 / 包装
copy.intro: 提取青花瓷纹样、蓝白关系与器物气质，形成具有东方审美的包装视觉。
copy.introEn: A blue-and-white porcelain packaging study built from pattern, contrast, and object elegance.

copy.name: 博物馆VR-游戏
copy.title: Museum VR game
copy.subtitle: 博物馆 / VR游戏 / 沉浸式体验
copy.intro: 以武汉辛亥革命博物馆为载体，实地调研馆藏展陈与历史叙事逻辑，搭建 VR 沉浸式交互体系，梳理空间动线、交互流程与氛围视觉，产出完整文博数字化沉浸设计研究成果。
copy.introEn: Using the Wuhan 1911 Revolution Museum as the research carrier, this project investigates exhibition narratives and historical logic, builds a VR immersive interaction system, and organizes spatial circulation, interaction flows, and visual atmosphere into a complete cultural heritage digital immersion design study.

copy.name: 儿童食品安全-画册
copy.title: Illustrations on child food safety
copy.subtitle: 儿童科普 / 画册 / 文创周边
copy.intro: 围绕儿童食品安全科普展开插画、画册、展板与周边延展，建立亲和但有秩序的视觉系统。
copy.introEn: An illustrated science-education system extending into booklets, posters, and peripheral objects.

copy.name: 新中式-釉青
copy.title: Celadon New Chinese
copy.subtitle: 新中式 / 釉青瓷器 / 服装语言
copy.intro: 以釉色、瓷器轮廓与东方留白为线索，构建温润克制的新中式服装表达。
copy.introEn: A restrained new-Chinese fashion language shaped by celadon glaze, ceramic form, and quiet space.

copy.name: 可持续-海洋污染
copy.title: Sustainable Ocean
copy.subtitle: 可持续 / 海洋污染 / 配饰系统
copy.intro: 从海洋污染议题出发，将环保材料、头饰、项圈与组合造型整合为可持续视觉叙事。
copy.introEn: A sustainable fashion narrative connecting ocean pollution, accessories, styling, and material reuse.

copy.name: 展陈动线
copy.title: Gallery Flow
copy.subtitle: 观看路径 / Spatial Display
copy.intro: 以墙面、画框与光线组织作品观看顺序，让空间成为作品集的一部分。
copy.introEn: A display flow where wall, frame, and light guide the portfolio viewing.

copy.name: 民宿设计
copy.title: Interior Design
copy.subtitle: 白色空间 / Soft Minimal
copy.intro: 强调光、尺度与动线，构建可漫游、可停留、可被作品重新定义的工作室空间。
copy.introEn: White-space interiors led by light, proportion, circulation, and calm materiality.

images.alt: 扬子江-食物 zmx作品集2_31.png
images.caption: 新图片

copy.name: 扬子江-食物
copy.title: Yangtze Pastry
copy.subtitle: 糕点包装 / 传统品牌 / 产品设计
copy.intro: 围绕糕点品牌展开包装、图形与场景展示，平衡传统感与当代商业表达。
copy.introEn: A pastry packaging system balancing traditional food culture with contemporary brand expression.

copy.name: 厚米-酒
copy.title: Rice Wine Package
copy.subtitle: 酒类包装 / 地域感 / 产品识别
copy.intro: 围绕酒类产品建立包装识别、图形延展与货架展示关系。
copy.introEn: A beverage packaging system connecting identity, graphic extension, and shelf presence.

images.caption: 新图片

copy.name: 女书-日用
copy.title: Nushu Package
copy.subtitle: 女书文化 / 包装视觉 / 字形转译
copy.intro: 以女书文化和字形结构为视觉线索，将传统符号转译为当代包装语言。
copy.introEn: A packaging system translating Nushu cultural signs and letterform rhythm into contemporary design.

copy.name: 视觉设计-四套包装
copy.title: Package Index
copy.subtitle: 四套包装 / 视觉索引
copy.intro: 将多套包装项目整理为索引式入口，呈现不同主题下的视觉系统差异。
copy.introEn: An index view for multiple packaging systems and their distinct visual strategies.

copy.name: 标志-系统
copy.title: 标志 logo
copy.subtitle: 图形 / 字体 / 标志
copy.intro: 围绕标志图形、比例网格、字体关系与应用延展建立展示页面
copy.introEn: A ceramic packaging study focused on object temperament and restrained display order.

copy.name: 异形蛛网-束缚突破
copy.title: Dark-themed clothing
copy.subtitle: 异形蛛网 / 束缚 / 突破
copy.intro: 将蛛网结构转译为服装线条，在束缚与突破之间建立具有张力的身体轮廓。
copy.introEn: A silhouette study translating web-like structures into tension between restraint and release.

copy.name: 影像纪实
copy.title: Visual works
copy.subtitle: 综合作品 / 手作 / 影像档案
copy.intro: 收纳摄影、实验媒介与未归类创作，作为个人创作脉络中的开放档案。
copy.introEn: An open archive for photography, drawing, experimental media, and uncategorized works.

copy.name: 肌理研究
copy.title: Texture Study
copy.subtitle: 材料痕迹 / Emotional Surface
copy.intro: 将手绘痕迹、肌理切片与页面节奏并置，保留创作过程中的偶然性。
copy.introEn: Handmade traces and material fragments arranged as a slow visual surface.

copy.name: 绘画书法
copy.title: Painting Works
copy.subtitle: 线条 / 肌理 / 色彩
copy.intro: 以线条和留白记录，作品在轻与重之间建立更慢的观看节奏。
copy.introEn: Line-based studies that use blank space to hold slower emotional observation.

copy.name: 废土风-沙丘
copy.title: Wasteland Dune
copy.subtitle: 废土风 / 沙丘 / 造型实验
copy.intro: 以沙丘与废土语汇为灵感，提取粗粝材质、包裹结构与未来感轮廓。
copy.introEn: A wasteland-inspired fashion study built from dune textures, wrapped structures, and speculative silhouettes.
